* {{ill|Ōmushi Shrine (Echizen)|ja|大虫神社|3=大虫神社 (越前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmushi Shrine (Echizen)|qq=}} - Located in Echizen City, Fukui Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōmushi Shrine (Yosano)|ja|大虫神社 (与謝野町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmushi Shrine (Yosano)|qq=}} - Located in Yosano, Yosa District, Kyoto Prefecture.
